LanguageData.OuterRim_A180Blaster.description: The A-180 blaster was a modular blaster manufactured by BlasTech Industries. Though theoretically capable of being easily reconfigured for various battlefield roles, the vast majority found are the simple blaster pistol variant.
LanguageData.OuterRim_DH17Pistol.label: dh-17 blaster carbine
LanguageData.OuterRim_DH17Pistol.description: The DH-17 blaster carbine was a close-combat blaster weapon produced by BlasTech Industries.
LanguageData.OuterRim_DH17Rifle.description: Not to be confused with the more compact DH-17 carbine, the DH-17 rifle was another staple of the Rebel Alliance's armouries. With a full stock and improved optics, it was more accurate than the carbine model.
LanguageData.OuterRim_HH12RocketLauncher.description: A simple but effective shoulder-fired rocket launcher utilized by the Rebel Alliance, engineered to take advantage of generous leftover stocks of RPS-6 missiles that were once used by the Galactic Republic before its dissolution.
